picks.name: McDonald's
picks.intro: The world's largest fast food chain, operating in 100+ countries. A business most people know and interact with daily.
picks.intro_zh: 全球最大速食連鎖品牌，在100多個國家都有門市，大家最熟悉的漢堡王者。
reasons: RSI ~39 — in oversold territory, historically a strong entry signal for long-term holders.
MACD still negative but converging; price sits clearly below the 200-day MA (~$308).
Unmatched brand strength, global expansion, and consistent dividend growth.
reasons_zh: 目前RSI約39，處在相對低檔，有急迫感。
MACD雖然還是負值但收斂中，股價明顯低於200日均線（約308）。
品牌超強、全球持續展店，每年穩定發股息。
picks.summary: One of the most defensive consumer brands on the planet — this week's best risk/reward for long-term DCA.
picks.summary_zh: 本週綜合多項指標，這支是目前最值得開始或繼續DCA建倉的選擇，適合長期穩穩存。

picks.name: Procter & Gamble
picks.intro: P&G makes Pampers, Crest, Pantene and dozens of other everyday essentials. Products people buy regardless of economic conditions.
picks.intro_zh: 寶鹼就是生產幫寶適、佳潔士、潘婷等日常用品的巨頭，大家每天都在用的東西。
reasons: RSI ~42 — neutral-to-low, creating a calm entry window.
MACD negative; price near or below the 200-day MA.
Recession-proof staples, stable earnings, and a decades-long dividend streak.
reasons_zh: MACD負值，股價接近或低於200日均線。
賣的都是生活必需品，景氣好壞影響小，獲利穩定且長期股息很強。
picks.summary: A defensive anchor for any DCA portfolio — steady, boring, and reliably rewarding.
picks.summary_zh: 防禦型的好標的，適合想穩穩長期投入的散戶朋友。

picks.name: JPMorgan Chase
picks.intro: America's largest bank by assets, with diversified operations spanning consumer banking, investment banking, and asset management.
picks.intro_zh: 美國規模最大的銀行之一，業務涵蓋存款、貸款、投資等。
reasons: RSI ~38-40 — low and showing urgency for patient accumulators.
MACD negative; price at a technical support zone.
Scale advantage, diversified revenue, strong profitability across economic cycles.
reasons_zh: MACD負值，技術面處在相對支撐區。
規模最大、業務分散，獲利能力強，長期成長穩定。
picks.summary: This week's standout in financials — strong moat, attractive entry point, built for 3-5 year holds.
picks.summary_zh: 本週金融類中CP值突出，適合想分散風險、長期持有的朋友。
